title: Saudi Arabian Kebab with Beet Chutney
description: A flavorful and aromatic kebab dish from Saudi Arabia, served with a sweet and tangy beet chutney.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine chopped beets, onion, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together fermented yogurt, lemon juice, and olive oil. Add the blended beet mixture and stir to combine.
Add the juicy beef pieces to the marinade and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat a tablespoon of olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the beet chutney to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until heated through.
Serve the grilled kebabs with the warm beet chutney spooned over the top.
